prompt: Cinematic illustration of a classic red 1980s BMW E30 parked on a charming urban street during golden hour. The car features lowered stance, deep dish gold mesh wheels, glossy red paint, detailed headlights, sporty front splitter, and vintage license plate. Warm sunlight reflects beautifully across the bodywork.\nBackground shows a cozy brick building covered with lush green ivy and hanging plants, large black framed windows, boutique storefronts, vintage signage displaying "1986", café atmosphere, and tree shadows stretching across the pavement. Rich golden sunlight filters through the leaves creating dramatic highlights and soft shadows.\nAnime inspired realism, hand painted digital artwork, Studio Ghibli inspired urban environment, cinematic color grading, warm orange and amber tones, highly detailed architecture, realistic reflections, atmospheric lighting, dreamy summer afternoon mood, ultra detailed concept art, depth and perspective, 8K quality, masterpiece illustration, trending on ArtStation.
